Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIN H. WELSH OF THE BLAXTER LAW, TEL. NO. (310)490-9564 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSHUA A. RIDLESS, TEL. NO. 614-2600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF WHOLE FOODS MARKET GROUP, INC.'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF PROVING THE PROBABILITY OF ITS CLAIM. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WHOLE FOODS MARKET GROUP, INC.'S APPLICATION For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued on the court's own motion to April 24, 2013 to give opposing the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 12, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
